positive: A highly stylized celestial floral wreath arrangement, designed as a seamless graphic print. The main elements include glowing, bioluminescent moonflowers and abstract nebula swirls intertwined with geometric ivy leaves and stylized crescent moons. Composition must be centralized and symmetrical, forming a clear, repeatable motif suitable for apparel. Use a limited, vibrant color palette of deep indigo, luminous gold, sage green, and ethereal cyan. The style should be a mix of Art Nouveau poster design and modern tattoo illustration, featuring crisp silhouettes and high contrast linework. Studio quality, vector art aesthetic, ultra detail, 8k, clean lines.
negative: blurry, noise, jpeg artifacts, text, signature, watermark, out of frame, extra limbs, poorly drawn, bad anatomy, low contrast, dirty, messy, grayscale, logo, typography
